title: Understand: Introduction to the Constitutional Convention
description: Check your understanding on the reasons for the Constitutional Convention in this set of multiple-choice questions.
topic_path: The Road to Reform, the Constitutional Convention, and the Battle for Ratification
Understand: Introduction to the Constitutional Convention

assessment_items.question_content:
**During which year did the Constitutional Convention occur in Philadelphia?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which founder spent the summer before the Constitutional Convention reading books on government and preparing a plan to present at the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**According to Congress, what was the purpose of the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to create an entirely new form of government
to revise the Articles of Confederation
to make George Washington the president of the United States

assessment_items.question_content:
**Where did the Constitutional Convention of 1787 take place?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which state declined to send representatives to the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**What was true about the backgrounds of the delegates who attended the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The delegates were selected by their state legislatures.
On average, the delegates were in their forties.
The delegates were elected by a statewide popular vote.
Nearly half of the delegates were from Massachusetts.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the phrases that best complete the sentence.**

 During the debates about the presidency, some delegates, like Alexander Hamilton, wanted a \_\_\_\_, while others, like Roger Sherman, wanted a \_\_\_\_.


[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these famous founders were present at the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**What role did George Washington play at the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: He served as president of the Convention.
He was a primary author of the Constitution.
He refused to attend the Constitutional Convention.
He defended the Articles of Confederation.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Besides George Washington, which other important founder attended the Constitutional Convention and helped to legitimize it? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How did each state determine which delegates would attend the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Each state government nominated and appointed delegates.
The people of the state elected their delegates in statewide popular elections.
George Washington selected the delegates for each state.
Any person who wanted to attend could serve as a delegate.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What was the central challenge for the Constitutional Convention?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: How to unite the colonies in a war against the British government
How to eliminate all taxes on American citizens
How to strengthen the central government, while still protecting against government abuse
How to get all Americans to support the creation of a new national government
